# ferriskey_realm (Resource)

Manages a FerrisKey realm. A realm is the root container for clients, users, roles and organizations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ferriskey_realm" "example" {
  name = "acme"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique realm name. Renaming the realm in place is supported.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) RFC3339 creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Terraform identifier for the realm (equal to `name`).
- `realm_id` (String) Server-assigned UUID of the realm.
- `settings` (Attributes) Server-managed realm settings (read-only). Configure these through the FerrisKey admin surfaces; they are surfaced here for reference. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings))
- `updated_at` (String) RFC3339 last-update timestamp.

<a id="nestedatt--settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `settings`

Read-Only:

- `access_token_lifetime` (Number) Access token lifetime (seconds).
- `compass_enabled` (Boolean) Whether Compass analytics are enabled.
- `default_signing_algorithm` (String) Default token signing algorithm.
- `email_verification_enabled` (Boolean) Whether email verification is enabled.
- `email_verification_ttl_hours` (Number) Email verification token lifetime (hours).
- `forgot_password_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the forgot-password flow is enabled.
- `id` (String) Settings UUID.
- `id_token_lifetime` (Number) ID token lifetime (seconds).
- `magic_link_enabled` (Boolean) Whether magic-link login is enabled.
- `magic_link_ttl` (Number) Magic-link time-to-live (seconds).
- `passkey_enabled` (Boolean) Whether passkey login is enabled.
- `realm_id` (String) Owning realm UUID.
- `refresh_token_lifetime` (Number) Refresh token lifetime (seconds).
- `remember_me_enabled` (Boolean) Whether 'remember me' is enabled.
- `temporary_token_lifetime` (Number) Temporary token lifetime (seconds).
- `updated_at` (String) RFC3339 last-update timestamp of the settings.
- `user_registration_enabled` (Boolean) Whether self-service user registration is enabled.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Realms are imported by name.
terraform import ferriskey_realm.example acme
```
